The Crest

One badge.
Every flag.

Twenty-six flags around one golden globe. The crest is a promise, not a decoration — wherever the game is played, the family is already there, holding the same standard under a different sky.

The Pillars

What the badge stands for

Six things we never trade. Everything OTF3K puts its clover on answers to these.

The Badge

A crest you have to live up to before you get to wear it. Identity first, product second — always.

Identity

The Family

One name across twenty-six countries. If you carry the clover, you are never in an away end alone.

Community

The Pitch

It all comes back to the game — the streets, the cages, the stadium nights. That is where the standard was set.

Roots

The Drops

OTF3K Exclusive — small runs, stitched heavy, never restocked. When it is gone, it belongs to whoever moved first.

Exclusive

The Journey

Amsterdam is the postcode, not the ceiling. Every city we touch gets added to the crest in spirit.

Global

The Standard

Discipline earns the reward. No shortcuts on quality, no borrowed hype — the work shows up before the flex does.

Discipline
The Journey

From Amsterdam to everywhere.

18+ · Play responsibly — past results never guarantee future outcomes.

Contact

Talk to the family.

Bookings, collabs, press, or you just want in — one message reaches us. Faceless by design, direct by principle.

Telegramt.me/OTF_betts → Instagram@jay_otf3k → EmailOnlythefamily3k@gmail.com →

Replies come from the inner circle — no management layer, no middlemen.

The Reviews

Word from the family.
